---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(stringr)
library(DataExplorer)
library(funModeling)

movies <- read.csv()
```


##Data Cleaning
```{r}
#Converting the indicator variables to factors
movies$IsVideoGame <- as.factor(movies$IsVideoGame)
movies$IsSpringRelease <- as.factor(movies$IsSpringRelease)

#log-transformed variables
movies$logDomestic <- log(movies$Domestic)
movies$logPrev <- log(movies$logPrevFilmDomestic)
movies$logBudget <- log(movies$Budget)

#Sequel ratio
movies$SequelRatio <- movies$DomesticTotal / movies$PrevFilmDomestic
```

##Exploratory Data Analysis

Plot 1: Raw Data
```{r}
par(mfrow = c(1,1))
plot(DomesticTotal ~ PrevFilmDomestic, data = movies, 
     main = "Sequel Domestic Gross vs. Predecessor Gross")
      xlab = "Previous Film Domestic Total ($M)"
      ylab = "Sequel Domestic Total ($M)"

abline(lm(DomesticTotal ~ PrevFilmDomestic, data = movies),
       col = "red", lwd = 2)
abline(a = 0, b = 1, col = "gray", lty = 2, lwd = 1)
```

Plot 2: Log~Log scale
```{r}
plot(logDomesticTotal ~ logPrev, data = movies,
     main ="Log Sequel Gross vs. Log Predecessor Gross",
     xlab = "log(Previous Film Domestic Total)",
     ylab = "log(Sequel Domestic Total)")
     
     
abline(lm(logDomestic ~ logPrev, data = movies), col = "red", lwd = 2)
```

Plot 3: Sequel Ratio Dist.
```{r}
hist(movies$SequelRatio, breaks = 12,
     main = "Distribution of Sequel Ratios",
     xlab = "Sequel Ratio", col = "lightblue", border = "white")

abline(v = 1, col = "red", lty = 2, lwd = 2)
abline(v = median(movies$SequelRatio), col = "blue", lty = 2, lwd = 2)

```










EDA - Exploratory Data Analysis:
```{r}
glimpse(movies)
summary(movies)
```

##Data Cleaning:

```{r}

```


Remove duplicate rows:
```{r}
movies <- movies[!duplicated(movies), ]
```

Drop rows with NAs in key variables:
```{r}
movies <- movies |>
  drop_na()
```


##Data Transformation:
```{r}

```
